creator: jb.1234abcd@gmail.com
text:
> Please try:
>  # portmaster -o print/freetype2 print/freetype
> It looks like a dependency further down the chain may be wrong as well.
> Let me know if this works for you, and we can investigate further.

# portmaster -o print/freetype2 print/freetype
===>>> The second argument to -o can be a port in /var/db/pkg,
       or a port directory from /usr/ports

       print/freetype does not seem to be installed,
       or listed as a dependency

===>>> No valid installed port, or port directory given
===>>> Try portmaster --help

Terminated
#
$ ls
/var/db/pkg/freetype2-2.4.11/
$
